Notice Of Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT.
Appearances: Josh Voorhees and Co-counsel of the Chanler Group (510.848.8882) for plaintiff and moving party; Joseph J. Orzano of Seyfarth Shaw LLP (397.2823) appearing via Court Call for defendant Staples.
Argued and the court took the matter under submission. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

Notice Of Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-17-2012 Continued To Apr-25-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is continued on the court's own motion to April 25, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
